title: noccaea maassoumii
intro: Noccaea maassoumii, also known as Maassoum's penny-cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This perennial plant is native to the mountainous regions of Iran and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Noccaea maassoumii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping its leaves and flowers in hot water, and it can also be used in capsules or tinctures.
